title: CC narrative review S14 panel a2

payload.notes:
CC NARRATIVE review of S14 (beat B08, shot S14 — "K3 upgrade / invariant injection" + soul line). STORY-only judgment.

BEAT FIDELITY 4.5/5 — The panel delivers its beat cleanly. The central purple invariant bloom reads as the moment K3 is promoted to a hard invariant (I-K3) inside the navy wiki void; the reviewer (green hoodie, near-black hair, beard) is foregrounded forging the lesson into load-bearing memory. The 'this is now an invariant, not a soft note' meaning lands, and the soul line is supported by the composition rather than fighting it. The only reason it is not a 5 is that the before/after node-state contrast (K3 was previously soft) still leans on the caption rather than a fully visible prior-state cue.

COMPOSITION (STORY) 4.5/5 — Reading order flows reviewer -> central invariant bloom -> the upgrade core in a clean left-to-right / inward sweep. Background pixel-terminal UI is now pushed to the edges, leaving the upper-left dark void clear for the HTML bilingual caption, so the story beat is not crowded. Cell stays distinct from S12 (rollback entry), S13 (diagnosis) and S15 (RE-RUN ENFORCED). Visual identity-lock / artifact severity / safezone-cleanliness / stray-text are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers.
